column1: To let the player create, set rules and simulate fantasy football league or their own creation.
The player will be in a overseeing position in a constant god mode, and they can let things play out as per their own set rules, or they can at any time change things if they would so like.

By adding in things like weather, attendance, qualification games, randomness, the player will be able to create a narrative in their own head, essentially building a story about that particular league.
